#ifndef AST_GENERE_H
#define AST_GENERE_H

#include "compiler/ast/nodes/interfaces/i_node.h"
#include "compiler/ast/nodes/interfaces/i_expression.h"
#include "compiler/ast/registry/node_component_registry.h"
#include "compiler/visitor/interfaces/i_visitor.h"
#include "compiler/lexer/lexer.h"
#include <cstddef>
#include <utility>
#include "compiler/ast/registry/types/i_type.h"
#include <llvm/ADT/ArrayRef.h>

// Do not modify the code; this section is dynamically generated by the Jinja2 template.
// Enum dynamically generated for all AST nodes
//enum class NodeTypeGenerated {    Instruction,    CallFunction,    ArgFunction,    DeclarationFunction,    Return,    AssignmentVariable,    DeclarationVariable,    RefVariable,    UnRefVariable,    Identifiant,    AssignmentArray,    ArrayInitialization,    ReadingArray,    Class,    CallObject,    AccesAttribute,    DeclarationObject,    If,    New,    Delete,    Include,    While,    Operation,    Literal,    Negation,    String,};

class NodeInstruction;
class NodeCallFunction;
class NodeArgFunction;
class NodeDeclarationFunction;
class NodeReturn;
class NodeAssignmentVariable;
class NodeDeclarationVariable;
class NodeRefVariable;
class NodeUnRefVariable;
class NodeIdentifiant;
class NodeAssignmentArray;
class NodeArrayInitialization;
class NodeReadingArray;
class NodeClass;
class NodeCallObject;
class NodeAccesAttribute;
class NodeDeclarationObject;
class NodeIf;
class NodeNew;
class NodeDelete;
class NodeInclude;
class NodeWhile;
class NodeOperation;
class NodeLiteral;
class NodeNegation;
class NodeString;


class NodeInstruction : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeInstruction(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}
    ~NodeInstruction() override = default;

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
        return NodeTypeGenerated::Instruction;
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Instruction;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;
    
};


// class NodeInstruction : public INode { // FAIT
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Instruction;
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _children; // children

// public:
//     NodeInstruction() = default;    NodeInstruction(llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> children = nullptr) : _children(children) {}    ~NodeInstruction() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Instruction;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getChildren() const { return _children; }
// };

class NodeCallFunction : public INode { // important, je devrais mettre du crtp pour le INODE avec le EXOTIC CRTP ;))))))
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeCallFunction(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::CallFunction; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::CallFunction;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

//     Token _nomFunction; // function_name
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _children; // children

// public:
//     NodeCallFunction() = default;    NodeCallFunction(Token nomFunction, llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> children = nullptr) : _nomFunction(std::move(nomFunction)), _children(children) {}    ~NodeCallFunction() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {

//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomFunction() const { return _nomFunction; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getChildren() const { return _children; }
// };

class NodeArgFunction : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeArgFunction(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::ArgFunction; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::ArgFunction;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeDeclarationFunction : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeDeclarationFunction(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationFunction; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationFunction;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeReturn : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeReturn(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Return; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Return;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeAssignmentVariable : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeAssignmentVariable(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::AssignmentVariable; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::AssignmentVariable;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeDeclarationVariable : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeDeclarationVariable(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationVariable; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationVariable;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeRefVariable : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeRefVariable(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::RefVariable; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::RefVariable;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// class NodeRefVariable : public INode { // FAIT
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::RefVariable;
//     Token _nomVariable;

// public:
//     NodeRefVariable() = default;    NodeRefVariable(Token nomVariable) : _nomVariable(std::move(nomVariable)) {}    ~NodeRefVariable() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::RefVariable;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomVariable() const { return _nomVariable; }
// };

class NodeUnRefVariable : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeUnRefVariable(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
// me semble être la meilleur alternative, il ne dit que la liste des membres
// que le noeud à conceptuellement et théoriquement.
    struct info {
        using NAME = void*;
        using other_member = void*;
    };


    // pas du tout certain pour celle-ci
    struct meta  {
        using name_field_type = NAME_COMPONENT_TAG;
    };

    template <typename T>
    static void foo();

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::UnRefVariable; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::UnRefVariable;


        NodeUnRefVariable n{1};

        //NodeUnRefVariable::traits::USING_NAME_COMPONENT;

        //NodeUnRefVariable::component_info::name;

        NodeUnRefVariable::meta::name_field_type; 
        // UNE TRÈS TRÈS BONNE IDÉE MAIS LE PROBLÈME EST QUE TOUS LE SYSTÈME DEVIENS DÉPENDANT 
        // DU SYSTÈME COMPONENT_TAG EN PARTICULIER. JE NE PENSES PAS QUE CA SOIT OPTIMAL CAR
        // ÇA REND LE NODE DÉPENDANT DE L'IMPLÉMENTATION DU REGISTRE. JE NE PENSES PAS QUE JE
        // DEVRAIT GARDER CA. PEUT ÊTRE FAIRE JUSTE UNE STRUCT QUI DIT CE QUE CHAQUES NOEUDS 
        // ONT.


        //NodeUnRefVariable::info::


        foo<NodeUnRefVariable::meta::name_field_type>();

    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// };

class NodeIdentifiant : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeIdentifiant(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Identifiant; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Identifiant;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeAssignmentArray : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeAssignmentArray(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::AssignmentArray; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::AssignmentArray;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeArrayInitialization : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeArrayInitialization(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::ArrayInitialization; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::ArrayInitialization;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeReadingArray : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeReadingArray(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::ReadingArray; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::ReadingArray;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomArray() const { return _nomArray; }
// };


class NodeClass : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeClass(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Class; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Class;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// class NodeClass : public INode {
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Class;
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _Heritage; // base
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _listMembers; // members
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _builder; // constructors
//     Token _nomClass; // name

// public:
//     NodeClass() = default;    NodeClass(llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> Heritage, llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> listMembers, llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> builder, Token nomClass) : _Heritage(Heritage), _listMembers(listMembers), _builder(builder), _nomClass(std::move(nomClass)) {}    ~NodeClass() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Class;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getHeritage() const { return _Heritage; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getListMembers() const { return _listMembers; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getBuilder() const { return _builder; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomClass() const { return _nomClass; }
// };


class NodeCallObject : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeCallObject(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::CallObject; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::CallObject;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// class NodeCallObject : public INode {
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::CallObject;
//     Token _nomObject;
//     Token _nomMethode;
//     llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> _children;

// public:
//     NodeCallObject() = default;    NodeCallObject(Token nomObject, Token nomMethode, llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> children = nullptr) : _nomObject(std::move(nomObject)), _nomMethode(std::move(nomMethode)), _children(children) {}    ~NodeCallObject() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::CallObject;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomObject() const { return _nomObject; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomMethode() const { return _nomMethode; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD llvm::ArrayRef<INode*> getChildren() const { return _children; }
// };


class NodeAccesAttribute : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeAccesAttribute(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::AccesAttribute; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::AccesAttribute;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// private:

//     Token _nomObject;

// public:

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::AccesAttribute;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomObject() const { return _nomObject; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getNomAttribute() const { return _nomAttribute; }

class NodeDeclarationObject : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeDeclarationObject(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationObject; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::DeclarationObject;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

//     }

//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD IType* getTypeObject() const { return _typeObject; }
// };


class NodeIf : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeIf(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::If; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::If;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::If;

//     INode* _nodeBlocEndif;

// public:
//     NodeIf() = default;    NodeIf(INode* nodeCondition = nullptr, INode* nodeBlocIf = nullptr, INode* nodeBlocElse = nullptr, INode* nodeBlocEndif = nullptr) : _nodeCondition(nodeCondition), _nodeBlocIf(nodeBlocIf), _nodeBlocElse(nodeBlocElse), _nodeBlocEndif(nodeBlocEndif) {}    ~NodeIf() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD INode* getNodeBlocEndif() const { return _nodeBlocEndif; }
// };


class NodeNew : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeNew(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::New; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::New;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeDelete : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeDelete(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Delete; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Delete;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeInclude : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeInclude(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Include; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Include;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

class NodeWhile : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeWhile(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::While; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::While;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::While;

//     INode* _nodeBlocFinWhile;

// public:
//     NodeWhile() = default;    NodeWhile(INode* nodeCondition = nullptr, INode* nodeBlocWhile = nullptr, INode* nodeBlocFinWhile = nullptr) : _nodeCondition(nodeCondition), _nodeBlocWhile(nodeBlocWhile), _nodeBlocFinWhile(nodeBlocFinWhile) {}    ~NodeWhile() override = default;

class NodeOperation : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeOperation(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Operation; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Operation;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// class NodeOperation : public IExpression {
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Operation;
//     Token _token;
//     INode* _gauche;
//     INode* _droite;

// public:
//     NodeOperation() = default;    NodeOperation(Token token, INode* gauche = nullptr, INode* droite = nullptr) : _token(std::move(token)), _gauche(gauche), _droite(droite) {}    ~NodeOperation() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Operation;
//     }
//     IExpression* addExpression(INode* left, INode* right) override {        _gauche = left;        _droite = right;        return this;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getToken() const { return _token; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD INode* getGauche() const { return _gauche; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD INode* getDroite() const { return _droite; }
// };




class NodeLiteral : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeLiteral(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Literal; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Literal;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// OK ÉTANT DONNÉ QUE NOUS AVONS LE TOKENTYPE DANS TOKEN, IL SERAIT PLUS INTELLIGENT DE FAIRE
// UN SEUL SPARSE SET DE TOKENS ET DE FILTRER PAR LA SUITE AVEC TOKENTYPE

// EN FAITE JE NE SAIS PAS... SI JE FAIS UN SEUL, CA COUTE UN IF (TOKEN::TYPE == ...) ET CA GROSSIT
// SIGNIFICATIVEMENT LA TAILLE DU VECTEUR A PARCOURIR SI NOUS AVONS À ITÉRER. 

// D'UN AUTRE COTÉ, ÇA SEMBLE ÉTRANGE DE FAIRE UN SPARSE SET PAR SOUS CATÉGORIE DE COMPOSANTE.
// IL FAUT IMPÉRATIVEMENT TROUVER UNE SOLUTION, AVANCER NE SERA PLUS POSSIBLE TANT QU'IL N'Y 
// AURA PAS EU UN CONSENSUS SUR LA POSITION À ADOPTER. À VOIR.


// class NodeLiteralS : public INode {
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Literal;
//     Token _token;

// public:
//     NodeLiteral() = default;    NodeLiteral(Token token) : _token(std::move(token)) {}    ~NodeLiteral() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Literal;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getToken() const { return _token; }
// };

// class NodeLiteral : public INode { // FAIT
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Literal;
//     Token _token;

// public:
//     NodeLiteral() = default;    NodeLiteral(Token token) : _token(std::move(token)) {}    ~NodeLiteral() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Literal;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getToken() const { return _token; }
// };




class NodeNegation : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeNegation(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::Negation; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Negation;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// class NodeNegation : public INode {
// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::Negation;
//     Token _operateur;
//     INode* _operande;

// public:
//     NodeNegation() = default;    NodeNegation(Token operateur, INode* operande = nullptr) : _operateur(std::move(operateur)), _operande(operande) {}    ~NodeNegation() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::Negation;
//     }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD const Token& getOperateur() const { return _operateur; }
//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD INode* getOperande() const { return _operande; }
// };



class NodeString : public INode {
public:
    explicit constexpr NodeString(std::size_t p_id) : nodeId(p_id) {}

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
         return NodeTypeGenerated::String; // LE STOCKER DANS LE REGISTRY
    }

    PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) { // on dirait qu'il fait la meme chose que l'autre
        return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::String;
    }

public:
    PRYSMA_NODISCARD std::size_t getNodeId() const override { return nodeId; }

    void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
        visitor->visiter(this);
    }

private:
    std::size_t nodeId;

};

// private:
//     NodeTypeGenerated _nodeTypeGenerated = NodeTypeGenerated::String;

// public:
//     NodeString() = default;    ~NodeString() override = default;

//     void accept(IVisitor* visitor) override {
//         visitor->visiter(this);
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD NodeTypeGenerated getGeneratedType() const override {
//         return _nodeTypeGenerated;
//     }

//     PRYSMA_NODISCARD static bool classof(const INode* node) {
//         return node->getGeneratedType() == NodeTypeGenerated::String;
//     }
// };
